[user]: System: [2026-04-04 14:24:02 GMT+8] Feishu[kiit] DM | ou_f590c429b7ded95568bebca2f534efdb [msg:om_x100b523ea99314a0c363b6eb492b8ef] Conversation info (untrusted metadata): ```json { "message_id": "om_x100b523ea99314a0c363b6eb492b8ef", "sender_id": "ou_f590c429b7ded95568bebca2f534efdb", "sender": "ou_f590c429b7ded95568bebca2f534efdb", "timestamp": "Sat 2026-04-04 14:23 GMT+8" } ``` Sender (untrusted metadata): ```json { "label": "ou_f590c429b7ded95568bebca2f534efdb", "id": "ou_f590c429b7ded95568bebca2f534efdb", "name": "ou_f590c429b7ded95568bebca2f534efdb" } ``` 我给你安装了openviking 数据库，你测试一下是否可以检测到或者联通 [assistant]: [[reply_to_current]] 好的，我来检查一下。 先看看 workspace 里有没有相关配置，以及当前环境里有没有 running 的数据库服务。 [exec result]: 总计 68 drwxrwxr-x 9 halei halei 4096 4月 2 15:52 . drwx------ 22 halei halei 4096 4月 4 14:21 .. -rw-rw-r-- 1 halei halei 7876 4月 2 15:54 AGENTS.md -rw-rw-r-- 1 halei halei 1470 3月 19 20:55 BOOTSTRAP.md drwxrwxr-x 2 halei halei 4096 3月 29 22:54 .cache drwxrwxr-x 2 halei halei 4096 3月 25 22:22 .clawhub drwxrwxr-x 2 halei halei 4096 3月 26 13:40 feishu-bot-manager drwxrwxr-x 7 halei halei 4096 4月 2 15:52 .git -rw-rw-r-- 1 halei halei 168 3月 19 20:55 HEARTBEAT.md -rw-rw-r-- 1 halei halei 636 3月 19 20:55 IDENTITY.md drwxrwxr-x 2 halei halei 4096 4月 2 13:33 memory drwxrwxr-x 2 halei halei 4096 3月 19 20:55 .openclaw drwxrwxr-x 10 halei halei 4096 4月 1 22:24 skills -rw-rw-r-- 1 halei halei 3604 4月 2 15:31 SOUL.md -rw-rw-r-- 1 halei halei 860 3月 19 20:55 TOOLS.md -rw-rw-r-- 1 halei halei 806 3月 27 20:05 USER.md no MEMORY yet [exec result]: root 137389 3.0 0.8 2357884 33072 ? OpenViking Console Control Plane Dashboard
[assistant]: [[reply_to_current]] OpenViking 数据库运行正常，可以联通： | 端口 | 服务 | 状态 | |------|------|------| | **1933** | OpenViking API | ✅ 正常（返回 404 是预期的，根路径无内容） | | **8020** | OpenViking Console | ✅ 正常（Dashboard 可访问） | Docker 容器 IP 是 `172.17.0.2`，主服务监听 1933，控制台在 8020。 有什么具体要测试的功能吗？

[user]: System: [2026-04-04 14:25:08 GMT+8] Feishu[kiit] DM | ou_f590c429b7ded95568bebca2f534efdb [msg:om_x100b523ea2f730a0c434508886865fd] Conversation info (untrusted metadata): ```json { "message_id": "om_x100b523ea2f730a0c434508886865fd", "sender_id": "ou_f590c429b7ded95568bebca2f534efdb", "sender": "ou_f590c429b7ded95568bebca2f534efdb", "timestamp": "Sat 2026-04-04 14:25 GMT+8" } ``` Sender (untrusted metadata): ```json { "label": "ou_f590c429b7ded95568bebca2f534efdb", "id": "ou_f590c429b7ded95568bebca2f534efdb", "name": "ou_f590c429b7ded95568bebca2f534efdb" } ``` 不用，这样是不是就是说，以后你的数据短，中，长期记忆都是openviking来存储了 [assistant]: [[reply_to_current]] 不完全是。 **目前我的记忆机制：** - **短期记忆** → 当前对话上下文（session 生命周期） - **中期记忆** → `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md`（每日笔记，按日期） - **长期记忆** → `MEMORY.md`（我手动提炼的精华） 这些都是**文件**，存在 workspace 里，不是存在 OpenViking 里。 **OpenViking 能做什么：** 如果它本身是个知识库 / 向量数据库，那理论上可以这样用： - 让我把 MEMORY.md 定期同步进去 → 实现跨 session 的语义检索 - 把文档/数据扔进去 → 我可以基于它回答问题 但这需要**主动集成**，不是装上就自动连上的。 你在考虑用它做哪类记忆？是想要我每次醒来都能"查知识库"而不是靠文件？

[user]: System: [2026-04-04 14:44:25 GMT+8] Feishu[kiit] DM | ou_f590c429b7ded95568bebca2f534efdb [msg:om_x100b523f7a457ca4c3c91af24b16ad2] Conversation info (untrusted metadata): ```json { "message_id": "om_x100b523f7a457ca4c3c91af24b16ad2", "sender_id": "ou_f590c429b7ded95568bebca2f534efdb", "sender": "ou_f590c429b7ded95568bebca2f534efdb", "timestamp": "Sat 2026-04-04 14:44 GMT+8" } ``` Sender (untrusted metadata): ```json { "label": "ou_f590c429b7ded95568bebca2f534efdb", "id": "ou_f590c429b7ded95568bebca2f534efdb", "name": "ou_f590c429b7ded95568bebca2f534efdb" } ``` 在看一下，已开启向量记忆 [exec result]: {"detail":"Not Found"} [exec result]: {"detail":"Not Found"} [exec result]: OpenViking API - Swagger UI

Returns 200 when all subsystems are operational, 503 otherwise. No authentication required (designed for K8s probes).", "operationId": "readiness_check_ready_get", "responses": { "200": { "description": "Successful Response", "content": { "application/json": { "schema": {} } } } } } }, "/api/v1/system/status": { "get": { "tags": [ "system" ], "summary": "System Status", "description": "Get system status. ``result.user`` is the authenticated request's ``user_id`` (from API key or headers), not the process-wide service default — clients use this to resolve multi-tenant paths (e.g. OpenClaw plugin).", "operationId": "system_status_api_v1_system_status_get", "parameters": [ { "name": "x-api-key", "in": "header", "required": false, "schema": { "anyOf": [ { "type": "string" }, { "type": "null" } ], "title": "X-Api-Key" } }, { "name": "authorization", "in": "header", "required": false, "schema": { "anyOf": [ { [exec result]: { "status": "ready", "checks": { "agfs": "ok", "vectordb": "ok", "api_key_manager": "ok" } } [exec result]: (no output) [assistant]: [[reply_to_current]] 向量记忆已确认开启！ `/ready` 健康检查返回： ``` ✅ agfs: ok ✅ vectordb: ok ✅ api_key_manager: ok ``` 三个子系统全部在线。向量数据库已经可用了。 想用它做什么？比如我可以把 MEMORY.md 灌进去，或者接个知识库检索之类？

[user]: System: [2026-04-04 18:27:55 GMT+8] Feishu[kiit] DM | ou_f590c429b7ded95568bebca2f534efdb [msg:om_x100b523a346dd4a0c4a1e2edcfa6ef6] Conversation info (untrusted metadata): ```json { "message_id": "om_x100b523a346dd4a0c4a1e2edcfa6ef6", "sender_id": "ou_f590c429b7ded95568bebca2f534efdb", "sender": "ou_f590c429b7ded95568bebca2f534efdb", "timestamp": "Sat 2026-04-04 18:27 GMT+8" } ``` Sender (untrusted metadata): ```json { "label": "ou_f590c429b7ded95568bebca2f534efdb", "id": "ou_f590c429b7ded95568bebca2f534efdb", "name": "ou_f590c429b7ded95568bebca2f534efdb" } ``` clawhub 是不是已经切换到中国源了。 [exec result]: --- name: clawhub description: Use the ClawHub CLI to search, install, update, and publish agent skills from clawhub.com. Use when you need to fetch new skills on the fly, sync installed skills to latest or a specific version, or publish new/updated skill folders with the npm-installed clawhub CLI. metadata: { "openclaw": { "requires": { "bins": ["clawhub"] }, "install": [ { "id": "node", "kind": "node", "package": "clawhub", "bins": ["clawhub"], "label": "Install ClawHub CLI (npm)", }, ], }, } --- # ClawHub CLI Install ```bash npm i -g clawhub ``` Auth (publish) ```bash clawhub login clawhub whoami ``` Search ```bash clawhub search "postgres backups" ``` Install ```bash clawhub install my-skill clawhub install my-skill --version 1.2.3 ``` [exec result]: Usage: clawhub [options] [command] ClawHub CLI v0.9.0 install, update, search, and publish skills plus OpenClaw packages. Options: -V, --cli-version Show CLI version --workdir <dir> Working directory (default: cwd) --dir <dir> Skills directory (relative to workdir, default: skills) --site <url> Site base URL (for browser login) --registry <url> Registry API base URL --no-input Disable prompts -h, --help display help for command Commands: login [options] Log in (opens browser or stores token) logout Remove stored token whoami Validate token auth Authentication commands search [options] <query...> Vector search skills [exec result]: error: too many arguments. Expected 0 arguments but got 2. Usage: clawhub [options] [command] ClawHub CLI v0.9.0 error: too many arguments. Expected 0 arguments but got 2. Usage: clawhub [options] [command] ClawHub CLI v0.9.0 install, update, search, and publish skills plus OpenClaw packages. Options: -V, --cli-version Show CLI version --workdir <dir> Working directory (default: cwd) --dir <dir> Skills directory (relative to workdir, default: skills) --site <url> Site base URL (for browser login) --registry <url> Registry API base URL --no-input Disable prompts -h, --help display help for command Commands: login [options] Log in (opens browser or stores token) logout Remove stored token whoami Validate token auth Authentication commands search [options] <query...> Vector search skills install [options] <slug> Install into <dir>/<slug> update [options] [slug] Update installed skills uninstall [options] <slug> Uninstall a skill list List installed skills (from lockfile) explore [options] Browse latest updated skills from the registry inspect [options] <slug> Fetch skill metadata and files without installing publish [options] <path> Publish skill from folder delete [options] <slug> Soft-delete a skill (owner, moderator, or admin) hide [options] <slug> Hide a skill (owner, moderator, or admin) undelete [options] <slug> Restore a hidden skill (owner, moderator, or admin) unhide [options] <slug> Unhide a skill (owner, moderator, or admin) skill Manage published skills package Browse and publish OpenClaw packages ban-user [options] <handleOrId> Ban a user and delete owned skills (moderator/admin only) set-role [options] <handleOrId> <role> Change a user role (admin only) transfer Transfer skill ownership star [options] <slug> Add a skill to your highlights unstar [options] <slug> Remove a skill from your highlights sync [options] Scan local skills and publish new/updated ones Env: CLAWHUB_SITE CLAWHUB_REGISTRY CLAWHUB_WORKDIR (CLAWDHUB_* supported) https://registry.npmjs.org/ [exec result]: no credentials { "registry": "https://clawhub.ai" } [assistant]: [[reply_to_current]] 没看到切换中国源的迹象。当前配置： - **ClawHub registry**: `https://clawhub.ai` - **npm registry**: `https://registry.npmjs.org/` clawhub.ai 本身就是国际版，站点在美国节点。没有配置任何国内镜像（比如 npmmirror 或 clawhub 中文站）。 你想切换到国内镜像吗？还是有听到什么风声说要切？

[assistant]: [[reply_to_current]] 检查完了，如实说： **网站** `https://clawhub.ai` — 能访问，正常打开 **API** `/api/v1/skills` — 返回空列表（`{"items":[]}`） **clawhub explore** — 也显示 "No skills found" 网站首页显示 "No highlighted skills yet" 和 "No popular skills yet"，看起来 registry 确实是空的，不是网络问题。 **没有检测到任何中国源切换：** - 无 npmmirror / 腾讯云 / 阿里云镜像配置 - `clawhub config` 里 registry 仍是 `https://clawhub.ai` - 环境变量里也没有镜像相关配置 你是想从国内访问更快，还是听到风声说 clawhub 要出国内版？我可以帮你盯着这事。
